creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The legacy DRM modules have since been removed from the base system, and haven't been compiled into GENERIC in a long time.  They are preserved at [1], so you may submit the patch there, but I don't think it makes much sense to fix individual issues like this unless you are doing a comprehensive analysis of the DRM code.

[1] https://github.com/freebsddesktop/drm-legacy
